name: Feed the Shadow
tips: A Common Rat sacrificed for 2 mana nukes a 10 🤍 target — one of the cheapest removal lines in the game.
Feed a Dark-Matter-loaded Mage for a massive burst: a Mage with 5 DM sacrificed deals (mage's 🗡️) + 5 damage.
Eclipse Shade is perfect Feed fodder: 20 🗡️ becomes 20 guaranteed damage before the self-burn eats it.
The +1 Dark Matter to every ally Mage is easy to miss — chain Feed the Shadow with Dark Matter Stash to stack DM fast.
Don't over-sacrifice. Giving up a 5-mana minion for 2-mana removal rarely trades up unless the enemy target is a game-winner.
rulings: The damage equals the sacrificed ally's total 🗡️ (base + attack_bonus) plus that same ally's Dark Matter stacks. The caster's DM is irrelevant.
Sacrifice is a Cost, not an effect — it resolves before the damage and before the Dark Matter grant.
If you have no valid ally to sacrifice, Feed the Shadow cannot be cast.
The +1 Dark Matter to ally Mages grants to every Mage you control, including one summoned mid-chain by another effect.
